decisions.title: Productize Families Feature for General Availability
decisions.context: Family visualization is in beta with customer feedback from ULA. Documentation exists, frontend warns beta status, but core UX work (multi-run calcs, run-to-run rules) is incomplete. Need to decide GA timeline and remaining scope.

arguments.for: Customer feedback positive (DES-113), docs complete, CLI released. Families enable multi-run analysis—core to 'Decisions Captured' north star. Momentum exists.
arguments.against: Key UX patterns incomplete (DES-152, DES-149). Candidate run members page still in flight. May confuse users if shipped half-baked, hurting 'Embed Deeper' pillar.

decisions.title: Deprecate or Invest in Archived Channel Handling
decisions.context: Multiple bugs around archived enum channels in rule eval (ENG-9641, ENG-9640). Band-aid fixes accumulating. Need strategic call: full lifecycle support or remove archiving.

arguments.for: Archiving is essential for data hygiene as customers scale. Fixing properly supports 'Nail the Core'—reliable rule engine is table stakes.
arguments.against: Complexity creep. If rarely used, removing archiving simplifies codebase. Focus engineering on Canvas/Python Rules instead ('Build the Moat').

decisions.title: Prioritize Catalog Service Kafka Migration Completion
decisions.context: Schema design (ENG-9425) and consumer setup (ENG-9424) in progress. Foundational for real-time data ingestion at scale. Blocking multi-channel parquet support (ENG-9423).
decisions.blockedBy: Schema design not finalized; multi-channel parquet spike incomplete

arguments.for: Kafka backbone critical for Sift Edge and real-time decision capture. Unblocks performance at scale—directly ties to 'Embed Deeper' pillar.
arguments.against: Customer-facing bugs (calc channel edits, live mode scroll) create friction now. Could defer infrastructure work for immediate UX wins.

decisions.title: Standardize on LegendV2 and Composable Chart Components
decisions.context: LegendV2 polish (ENG-9593), closest tooltip (ENG-9639), chart adapter refactor (ENG-9367) all in flight. Explore V2 depends on consistent charting. Commit or simplify?

arguments.for: Composable architecture future-proofs Explore V2 and Canvas. Better DX = faster iteration. 'Nail the Core' for visualization layer.
arguments.against: Refactor risk during high-velocity product work. Could ship Explore V2 with current charts, iterate post-launch.

decisions.title: Fast-Track ABAC for Remote Files or Defer for V2
decisions.context: ENG-8727 and ENG-8181 (large file attachments) in progress. Security model critical but slowing entity features. Ship without or delay entity enhancements?

arguments.for: ABAC non-negotiable for enterprise customers ('Embed Deeper'). Shipping insecure features creates tech debt and compliance risk.
arguments.against: Customers need file attachment features now (support requests rising). Ship with basic authz, harden later. Speed > perfection for market fit.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 80% meeting load—above healthy threshold. Three 1:1s today indicate reactive mode. Only 2 focus blocks scheduled despite critical decisions pending. Recommend: block Friday AM for decision doc writing, decline two tactical syncs.
alerts: Meeting density at 80%—risk of decision debt accumulation
Five open decisions without DRIs assigned; recommend decision log review Thursday
Zero focus time allocated Friday; Explore V2 chart refactor needs 4hr block
Catalog Kafka work blocked 11 days—escalate to unblock schema design

events.title: Sift CLI v0.1.0 Release
events.description: First stable CLI release ships. Enables programmatic workflow automation for power users.

events.title: Archived Channel Handling Decision
events.description: Finalize strategy: full support or deprecation. Blocks rule engine reliability OKR.

events.title: Weekly Strategy Sync
events.description: Review north star metrics, pillar health. Discuss Families GA timeline and Kafka blockers.

events.title: ABAC for Remote Files Decision Gate
events.description: Ship/defer decision. Impacts entity feature velocity and enterprise security posture.

events.title: Families Feature GA Decision
events.description: Commit to GA date or extend beta. ULA feedback review, UX completeness assessment.

events.title: LegendV2 Chart Standardization Decision
events.description: Commit to composable architecture or ship Explore V2 with legacy charts.

events.title: Catalog Kafka Migration Complete
events.description: Schema finalized, consumer deployed. Unblocks multi-channel parquet and Sift Edge work.

events.title: Mid-Sprint Demo: Families + Canvas
events.description: Show multi-run calculated channels, run-to-run rules, candidate members page.

events.title: Explore V2 Beta Launch
events.description: Pathname migration complete, LegendV2 shipped, async panel loading live. Limited beta rollout.

events.title: Q2 OKR Review: Nail the Core
events.description: Assess rule engine reliability, calc channel stability, live mode performance against targets.

events.title: Python Rules General Availability
events.description: Remove beta tag, publish case studies, update pricing. Target: 100 rules in production.

events.title: Sift Edge Private Preview Kickoff
events.description: First customer deployments. Requires Kafka migration completion and ABAC finalization.
